scores.reasoning: The homepage https://www.close.com confirms Close is a CRM focused on sales teams with features like leads, activities, contacts, and pipeline management, consistent with the description.
The cited auth_methods URL returns a 404 error, so there is no direct evidence supporting the claim that Close API uses API key and HTTP Basic Authentication as described.
The cited credential_access URL failed to load due to DNS resolution error, providing no evidence to support the claim that API keys are self-serve and free to create.
The developer.close.com page confirms Close provides a REST API with broad coverage, including API reference, SDKs, and multiple endpoints, supporting the api_surface claim.
Based on the available developer docs and homepage, the API is publicly documented, uses API key authentication, and has no blockers mentioned, supporting the buildability verdict.
